title: RSA 1:7. Perambulation of New Hampshire-Vermont State Line.
text:
The perambulation of the boundary line between the state of New Hampshire and the state of Vermont shall be as established and marked on land under the provisions of the opinion and associated decrees of the United States Supreme Court in the case ofVermont v. New Hampshire, 290 U.S. 579 (1933).

Source: Source. 2000, 35:1, eff. Jan. 1, 2001.
title_name: TITLE I THE STATE AND ITS GOVERNMENT
